flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Oklahoma City Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (9.6k vs 12.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Oklahoma City Community College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.2k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma City Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Oklahoma City Community College rose 57% between 2006 and 2009 (8.2% → 13.0%).
